title: Italian Corn Fritters
description: A crispy and savory Italian-inspired corn fritter recipe, perfect as a snack or side dish.
instructions: Combine cornmeal and fermented corn in a bowl.
In a separate bowl, whisk together eggs and a pinch of salt.
Add the egg mixture to the corn mixture and stir until just combined.
Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the corn mixture into the oil.
Fry the fritters for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Drain the fritters on paper towels and serve hot.
